query_basis: Programs table rows with verified state program evidence.
Waiver-like program rows or fallback to verified program rows when the state stores waiver entry in the general spine.
Verified early-intervention or Part C agency rows.
Verified regional education or district pages with special-education routing.

samples.sample_name: Connecticut State Department of Education Special Education

query_basis: Verified school-district routing pages for the state.
blocker_evidence: Reviewed current Connecticut school_district rows on 2026-06-22. Six county-linked rows still point to the statewide CDE special-education leaf https://portal.ct.gov/sde/special-education, and the remaining Fairfield and Hartford rows still point only to the generic CT SDE root https://portal.ct.gov/sde, so no district-owned education leaf is currently verified for any of Connecticut’s 8 counties.

query_basis: Verified programs with VR or Pre-ETS context.
Reviewed first-party Disability Rights Connecticut evidence on disk explicitly preserves Connecticut Protection and Advocacy designation text.

samples.evidence_snippet: DRCT is Connecticut's designated Protection & Advocacy System for individuals with disabilities in Connecticut.

query_basis: Reviewed 2026-06-22 live CPAC homepage plus bounded same-domain follow-ups after the saved first-party artifact remained too generic for PTI designation.
blocker_evidence: Reviewed 2026-06-22 live CPAC homepage plus bounded same-domain follow-ups. The homepage exposed only two same-domain links, likely About roots and sitemap endpoints returned 404, and no fetched first-party page preserved explicit PTI / Parent Training and Information designation text. CPAC still proves statewide Connecticut family-support and training scope, but not the exact PTI designation required for California-grade statewide support.

samples.evidence_snippet: The mission of the Connecticut Parent Advocacy Center is to educate, support, and empower Connecticut's families of children and youth with any disability or chronic conditions, ages birth to 26.

query_basis: Reviewed first-party Disability Rights Connecticut evidence on disk explicitly preserves statewide legally based advocacy services plus direct help-routing pages.

samples.evidence_snippet: DRCT, together with other state Protection & Advocacy agencies, make up the nation’s largest provider of legally based advocacy services for people with disabilities.

query_basis: Verified ABLE program pages from the program spine.
Verified county office rows for local routing.
blocker_evidence: Reviewed current Connecticut county_offices rows on 2026-06-22. Eleven county-office rows still use the DOI mirror https://doi.org/10.7910/DVN/AVRHMI with source_listed evidence, and the remaining Tolland row still points only to the generic locations root https://dhhs.connecticut.gov/locations, so county-local office routing is not yet backed by reviewed county-owned leaves.
